query: I manufacture both 33 Grade and 43 Grade OPC. Are these covered under a single BIS standard or separate ones?
My product uses fly ash blended with Portland clinker as the pozzolanic material. Which standard applies versus one using calcined clay?
We are sourcing coarse aggregates for both structural concrete and water-bound macadam road construction. Are these governed by the same standard?
Our plant makes precast pipes for use as both storm water drains and drinking water mains. Does one standard cover both, or do we need separate certifications?
I need a cement that resists aggressive sulfate soils AND hardens quickly. Can a single product satisfy both IS 8041 and IS 12330 requirements?
We are exporting white decorative cement. Which BIS specification must we declare compliance with for architectural finishes?
A contractor asks for masonry cement for brick mortar but specifies it should NOT be used for RCC columns. Which standard is relevant here?
Our lightweight concrete block density is 1,200 kg/m³. Does it fall under IS 2185 Part 2 or Part 3 specification?
We produce autoclaved aerated concrete panels with density 600 kg/m³ for external walls. Which Part of IS 2185 governs this?
A client wants precast concrete blocks that incorporate natural stone as aggregate for masonry. What standard should I refer to?
We supply sand for both concrete mixes and plastering works from the same source. Are the gradation requirements under the same BIS standard?
What is the standard for sand specifically intended for masonry mortar, as opposed to concrete?
We want to use cinder (industrial byproduct) as a fine aggregate in lime concrete. Which BIS standard defines its requirements?
Our factory produces artificial lightweight aggregates made from sintered fly ash for use in lightweight concrete masonry units. What standard applies?
Can supersulphated cement be used in seawater environments? Which BIS standard specifies its composition for such aggressive conditions?
I need a standard for high alumina cement used in structural applications where high early strength and refractory properties are needed.
Our precast unit makes reinforced fence posts for agricultural land boundaries. Which standard do we certify against?
We manufacture precast concrete kerb stones for road edging. Is there a dedicated BIS standard for this product?
A housing project requires precast door and window frames in reinforced concrete. Which specification should the manufacturer follow?
We supply precast coping blocks for garden walls and boundary walls. What is the relevant BIS standard?
Our plant is setting up to make precast ferrocement water tanks ranging from 500 to 5,000 litres. Which standard applies?
We manufacture precast concrete planks and joists specifically for constructing floors and roofs of buildings. Which BIS standard is applicable?
Our company makes precast L-panel units used as roofing elements in low-cost housing. What standard governs their physical requirements?
We produce precast reinforced concrete channel units used in composite floor and roof construction. Which standard do we conform to?
A specification calls for corrugated coir-woodwool-cement composite roofing sheets as an eco-friendly alternative. What BIS standard covers this product?
We make autoclaved cellular concrete wall panels reinforced with steel. Is there a specific BIS standard different from the block standard?
Our product is an autoclaved reinforced cellular concrete slab used for roofing. Which BIS standard applies versus the wall panel version?
I need the BIS standard for precast concrete covers and frames for manholes used in municipal sewerage systems.
We manufacture precast concrete blocks for lintels and sills in building openings. What standard should we comply with?
What BIS standard covers cable covers made from precast concrete used in underground utility installations?
Our factory produces asbestos cement pressure pipes for water supply distribution networks. Which standard governs their manufacture?
We produce shallow corrugated asbestos cement sheets, which differ from the standard corrugated profile. Which separate BIS standard applies?
I manufacture asbestos cement flat sheets for cladding and partition walls, not roofing. Is there a specific standard for flat sheets?
We make asbestos cement pipes for sewerage and surface drainage systems, not for pressure water supply. Which standard is relevant?
Our product is asbestos cement cable conduits and troughs for routing electrical cables. Which BIS standard should we comply with?
We produce a lighter version of asbestos cement pressure pipes described as light duty. Does a separate standard exist for these?
What is the standard for silica-asbestos cement flat sheets which differ from ordinary asbestos cement flat sheets?
Our factory produces prestressed concrete pipes including fittings for water transmission mains. Which standard applies instead of IS 458?
We manufacture steel cylinder pipes with concrete lining and external coating for high-pressure water mains. Which BIS standard governs this composite pipe?
Our plant makes porous concrete pipes specifically designed for agricultural subsurface drainage. Which standard applies instead of IS 458?
We produce perforated concrete pipes used for irrigation drainage. How does this differ from porous concrete pipes in terms of BIS standards?
I need the standard covering hot-applied bituminous sealing compounds used for filling joints in concrete pavements and structures.
Our company supplies preformed non-extruding and resilient bituminous fillers for expansion joints in concrete roads. Which Part of IS 1838 is relevant?
We manufacture preformed cork and other resilient material expansion joint fillers (non-bituminous). Which Part of IS 1838 applies?
A building specification calls for a two-part polysulphide-based sealant for structural glazing joints. Which BIS standard governs this product?
We supply one-part gun-applied polysulphide joint sealant for sealing movement joints in facades. What is the applicable BIS standard?
Our MSE produces building lime used in construction mortars and plasters. Which BIS standard defines the grades and requirements for building lime?
We use broken burnt clay bricks as coarse aggregate in lime concrete. Which BIS standard specifies requirements for such aggregate?
Our plant manufactures lime-based blocks for construction. Which BIS standard governs these blocks as distinct from concrete masonry blocks?
We produce lime-pozzolana mixture for use as a binding material in construction. Is there a BIS standard for this blended binder?
Our factory makes calcium silicate bricks (sand-lime bricks) as an alternative to clay bricks. Which BIS standard applies?
We manufacture pulverized fuel ash and lime bricks, also called PFA-lime bricks, a fly ash based product. What standard governs these?
What is the BIS standard for quick-setting lime-pozzolana mixture that is different from the regular lime-pozzolana mixture?
Our company supplies natural building stones for load-bearing masonry. Which standard specifies dimensions and workmanship for dressed stones?
We supply polished limestone slabs and tiles for flooring and cladding. Which BIS standard covers their requirements?
I need to source marble blocks and slabs for interior finishing. Which BIS standard defines the specifications for marble?
Our quarry produces structural granite used in building construction. Which BIS standard governs the requirements for structural granite?
We supply laterite stone blocks for masonry in coastal construction. Which BIS standard defines the requirements for laterite masonry blocks?
Our quarry produces sandstone slabs and tiles for flooring and paving applications. What BIS standard applies?
We manufacture roofing slate tiles from naturally occurring slate. Which BIS standard covers quality and dimensional requirements?
Our company sources coarse aggregate specifically for water-bound macadam road construction. Which standard is different from the concrete aggregate standard?
We supply stone lintels used over door and window openings in masonry construction. What BIS standard covers their dimensional and strength requirements?
What BIS standard covers polished building stones used for flooring and cladding purposes?
We make common burnt clay building bricks for general construction. Which BIS standard should we comply with?
Our plant produces heavy-duty burnt clay bricks for industrial flooring. How do these differ from common bricks in BIS standards?
We manufacture perforated burnt clay bricks with holes running through the body to reduce weight. Which BIS standard governs these?
Our factory makes facing bricks with high quality external appearance for exposed brickwork. Is there a separate standard from common bricks?
We supply paving bricks for pathways and driveways subject to pedestrian and light vehicle traffic. Which standard applies?
I need the BIS standard for hollow clay bricks used for non-load-bearing partition walls in buildings.
Our factory produces sewer bricks designed to resist chemical attack in municipal sewage systems. Which specific standard applies?
We manufacture burnt clay soling bricks used as foundation soling layer under floors. Is there a dedicated BIS standard?
Our plant makes bricks incorporating fly ash into the clay body as an eco-friendly product. Which BIS standard applies?
We produce burnt clay jali screens used decoratively on building facades for ventilation. What BIS standard applies to these lattice elements?
Our factory makes Mangalore pattern clay roofing tiles for pitched roof construction. Which BIS standard governs their dimensions and requirements?
We supply clay ridge tiles and ceiling tiles used at ridge junctions and overhead in buildings. Is there a dedicated standard separate from roofing tiles?
Our company produces clay flooring tiles for interior floor finishes. Which standard governs the strength and dimensional requirements?
We manufacture burnt clay tiles used specifically for lining irrigation canals and drainage works to prevent seepage. Which standard is applicable?
Our plant produces flat terracing clay tiles used as flooring on roof terraces. Which Part of IS 2690 applies?
We manufacture hollow clay tile blocks for floor filling in ribbed slab construction. Which Part of IS 3951 covers floor-filling units?
Our company makes country pattern clay roofing tiles (non-Mangalore type). Is there a BIS standard separate from IS 654 for these?
We manufacture gypsum plasterboard panels for dry-wall partition systems. Which BIS standard specifies their properties?
Our plant supplies non-load-bearing gypsum partition blocks for interior walls. Which standard is applicable?
We produce gypsum building plaster for internal plastering. Is there a BIS standard for its composition and fineness?
What is the BIS standard for gypsum plaster specifically used in the manufacture of fibrous plaster products?
We are a timber merchant dealing in coniferous sawn timber baulks and scantlings. Which BIS standard should our products comply with?
We supply non-coniferous hardwood sawn timber for structural carpentry. Which BIS standard governs baulks and scantlings of these species?
Our sawmill produces cut sizes of timber for joinery and furniture. Which BIS standard defines preferred cut dimensions?
We supply teak squares for premium structural and decorative applications. Is there a BIS standard specific to teak squares?
Our company sources timber specifically for cooling towers in industrial facilities. Which standard defines acceptable timber species and properties?
We supply structural timber for use in building construction. Which standard covers its grading and strength classification?
We produce ordinary plywood for general furniture and construction. Which standard applies versus structural plywood?
Our plant manufactures structural plywood for load-bearing applications in building construction. Which standard is different from ordinary plywood?
We supply veneered decorative plywood for high-quality interior surface finishes. Which BIS standard governs this product?
Our company produces medium density fibreboard (MDF) for general purposes. Which BIS standard should we comply with?
We make pre-laminated medium density fibre boards with decorative surface finish. Is there a standard separate from plain MDF?
Our factory produces bamboo mat boards used as general construction panels. Which BIS standard covers this emerging material?
We supply cement-bonded particle boards for use as external sheathing and partition material. Which standard applies?
Our company produces pre-laminated particle boards with a decorative surface. Which BIS standard covers this product?
We make bitumen felt for waterproofing of flat roofs and damp-proofing of basements. Which BIS standard specifies grades and properties?
Our plant produces oxidized bitumen used for waterproofing applications. Which BIS standard governs its grades?
We supply mastic asphalt for flooring and damp-proof course applications. Which BIS standard covers industrial flooring mastic?
I need the standard for blown bitumen (oxidized) grades used in manufacture of bituminous paints and roof coatings.
Our company produces silicone-based water repellent treatments for masonry surfaces. Which BIS standard applies to this product?
We supply glass fibre base coal tar pitch outer wraps for buried pipeline corrosion protection. Which standard governs this product?
Our plant manufactures flat transparent sheet glass for windows and glazing. Which BIS standard specifies grades and dimensional tolerances?
We produce figured, rolled, and wired glass for translucent architectural applications. Which standard applies instead of the clear sheet glass standard?
What BIS standard governs centrifugally cast (spun) iron pressure pipes used for water, gas, and sewage distribution?
We supply cast iron fittings such as bends, tees, and reducers for pressure pipelines. Which standard covers these fittings separately from the pipe standard?
Our factory makes steel door and window frames for residential construction. Which BIS standard specifies dimensions and performance?
We manufacture steel windows specifically for industrial buildings with larger spans. Is there a separate standard from the residential window standard?
Our company produces timber panelled and glazed door shutters. Which standard defines their construction and workmanship?
We manufacture flush doors with solid core or hollow core for interior use. Which BIS standard applies?
Our factory produces steel butt hinges for door and window installations. Which standard governs their dimensions and strength?
We supply stainless steel butt hinges as a corrosion-resistant option. Is there a separate standard from the mild steel hinge standard?
Our company makes rim latches for internal doors. Which BIS standard governs their design and performance?
We supply hydraulically operated concealed door closers. Which BIS standard applies to this product?
We make hook bolts used for fixing corrugated sheet roofing to purlins. Which BIS standard governs these fasteners?
Our plant manufactures high-strength structural bolts for steel-to-steel connections in bridges and buildings. Which standard applies?
We supply foundation bolts for anchoring structural steel columns to concrete foundations. Which BIS standard is relevant?
Our company makes hot forged steel rivets for structural steel connections. Which standard applies for rivets in the 12-36 mm diameter range?
We produce TMT reinforcing bars (thermo-mechanically treated) for RCC construction. Which BIS standard governs yield strength and elongation requirements?
Our plant makes fusion-bonded epoxy coated reinforcing bars for use in corrosive and marine environments. Which standard applies?
We supply mild steel and medium tensile steel bars for general structural use in plain and reinforced concrete. Which standard applies?
Our mill produces hot-rolled steel angles, channels, and beams (standard sections). Which BIS standard covers these structural sections?
We manufacture hot-rolled parallel flange beam and column sections (HEB/HEA type). Which BIS standard governs their dimensions?
Our factory produces structural hollow steel sections (SHS/RHS) for columns and trusses. Which standard applies?
We supply steel tubes specifically for structural purposes such as trusses and handrails. Is the applicable standard different from plumbing steel tubes?
Our plant produces structural weather-resistant steel for exposed steel structures. Which standard covers the atmospheric corrosion resistance requirements?
We supply corrugated aluminium sheets for lightweight roofing. Which BIS standard governs their dimensions and mechanical properties?
Our plant makes galvanized corrugated steel sheets for roofing and cladding. Which BIS standard applies?
We produce hot-dip terne-coated (lead-tin alloy) carbon steel sheets for roofing. Which BIS standard covers this product?
We supply covered electrodes for manual metal arc welding of structural mild steel. Which BIS standard applies to these consumables?
Our company makes filler rods and wires for gas welding of steel. Which standard covers these products?
We manufacture galvanized steel barbed wire for security fencing. Which BIS standard governs its manufacture?
Our company produces chain link fence fabric from galvanized steel wire. Which standard applies?
We produce expanded polystyrene (EPS) boards for thermal insulation in walls and roofs. Which BIS standard specifies density grades and thermal properties?
Our company supplies bonded mineral wool slabs for thermal insulation of building envelopes. Which standard applies?
We manufacture rock wool and slag wool in loose unbonded form for thermal insulation. Which BIS standard governs this product?
Our plant makes preformed rigid polyurethane foam boards for thermal insulation of cold storage facilities. Which BIS standard covers PUR foam insulation?
We supply rigid phenolic foam boards for fire-performance thermal insulation. Which standard applies, distinct from polyurethane foam?
Our company produces cellular glass blocks and pipe sections for high-temperature thermal insulation. Which BIS standard governs this product?
We supply preformed calcium silicate insulation for pipe and equipment insulation at temperatures up to 650°C. Which BIS standard applies?
Our plant makes preformed fibrous pipe insulation sections from mineral fibre for HVAC applications. Which BIS standard is relevant?
We supply thermal insulating cements for coating insulated surfaces. Which BIS standard governs these finishing products?
Our company produces PVC insulated cables for working voltages up to 1100 V for building wiring. Which BIS standard applies?
We supply PVC insulated heavy-duty cables. Which Part of IS 1554 covers power cables up to 1100 V?
Our plant makes rigid steel conduits for surface and concealed wiring in buildings. Which BIS standard applies?
We manufacture rigid non-metallic (PVC) conduits for electrical wiring. Which Part of IS 9537 is applicable?
Our company supplies fittings such as bends, couplings, and inspection boxes for rigid steel conduit wiring systems. Which standard applies?
We manufacture domestic switches for residential electrical installations. Which BIS standard governs their rating and performance?
Our company produces plugs and socket outlets rated up to 250V for household use. Which standard covers these products?
We make circuit breakers for overcurrent protection in household and similar electrical installations. Which BIS standard applies?
Our plant produces ceiling roses for electrical wiring connections. Which BIS standard governs their construction?
We supply enclosures for electrical accessories for household and fixed electrical installations rated up to 440V. Which standard applies?
Our company makes low density polyethylene (LDPE) films for damp-proofing and general construction use. Which BIS standard applies?
We produce polycarbonate sheets for rooflight applications and transparent cladding. Which BIS standard governs their specification?
Our factory makes rigid PVC sheets for lining tanks and chemical-resistant cladding. Which BIS standard applies?
We supply epoxy adhesives for room-temperature curing in general construction bonding applications. Which BIS standard is relevant?
Our company produces PTFE thread seal tape used for sealing pipe threaded joints in plumbing. Which BIS standard applies?
We manufacture cement concrete flooring tiles for industrial and commercial floors. Which BIS standard governs their strength requirements?
Our company makes decorative thermosetting laminated sheets (like Formica type) for furniture and interior surfaces. Which BIS standard applies?
We supply phenolic laminated sheets for electrical and structural applications. Is there a separate standard from the decorative laminate standard?
Our plant makes dust-pressed ceramic tiles with water absorption greater than 10% for wall tiling. Which BIS standard applies?
We manufacture dust-pressed ceramic tiles with low water absorption (less than 3%) for exterior flooring. Which standard applies?
Our company supplies rotational moulded polyethylene water storage tanks for domestic use. Which BIS standard applies?
We manufacture GRP (Glass Reinforced Plastics) pipes for use with potable water. Which standard applies versus GRP sewerage pipes?
Our factory produces high density polyethylene (HDPE) pipes specifically for sewage and drainage applications. Which standard is relevant?
We supply unplasticised PVC (UPVC) pipes for soil and waste discharge systems inside buildings. Which BIS standard covers this?
Our company makes cast iron rainwater pipes and fittings for external drainage from roofs. Which standard applies?
We manufacture sluice valves in the 50-1200mm size range for waterworks applications. Which BIS standard applies?
A tender specifies prefabricated brick panel systems with partial precast joists for floor construction. Which BIS standard covers this composite system?
We produce specials (fittings like bends and tees) for steel cylinder reinforced concrete pipe systems. Which standard governs these fittings?
Our plant makes stainless steel sinks for domestic kitchen use. Which BIS standard defines the dimensions and grade requirements?
We manufacture collapsible metal gates for garages and industrial shutter applications. Which BIS standard applies?
Our company makes steel sliding shutters for shop fronts and warehouses. Which standard applies?
We supply unit weights of building materials needed for structural dead load calculations. Which standard provides these reference values?
I need to know the dead load from our proposed masonry wall for structural design purposes. Which BIS standard tabulates unit weights of common building materials?
We supply putty for glazing metal window frames. Which BIS standard governs the composition and performance of this product?
Our company produces mastic cement specifically for bedding metal windows into masonry openings. Which standard is applicable?
We manufacture wood filler sold as plastic wood for joinery finishing. Which BIS standard covers this product?
Our plant produces uncoated stress-relieved low-relaxation seven-ply strands for prestressed concrete applications. Which BIS standard applies?
We need to certify our hard drawn steel wire used as prestressing tendons in prestressed concrete. Which BIS standard governs this?
Our company makes high-tensile steel wire bars used for post-tensioned prestressing systems. Which standard is relevant?
We supply GRP (glass reinforced plastics) pipes for sewerage and industrial effluent discharge. Which BIS standard applies, separate from the potable water version?
Our plant manufactures laminated veneer lumber (LVL) as an engineered wood product for structural beams. Which BIS standard covers this?
We produce bamboo mat corrugated sheets as an eco-friendly roofing material. Which BIS standard governs this product?
Our company makes high-strength structural nuts to pair with high-strength structural bolts. Is there a dedicated standard for these nuts?
A project requires flush doors with plywood face for exterior (moisture-resistant) use. Is the standard different from interior flush doors?
We make moulded high-density fibre (HDF) panel doors with raised profiles. Which BIS standard covers this engineered door product?
Our factory produces medium-density coirboards for general construction panels using coir fibres. Which BIS standard applies?
We supply coir veneer boards where coir mat is bonded to a timber core for wall paneling. Which BIS standard governs this product?
Our company produces bamboo mat veneer composite boards for furniture and construction purposes. Which BIS standard is applicable?
We make UPVC screens and casing pipes used for borewells and tubewells. Which BIS standard governs these products?
Our plant manufactures UPVC injection-moulded fittings for soil and waste discharge systems. Which standard is applicable?
We supply resilient air release valves for water distribution networks, made of cast iron. Which BIS standard applies?
Our company manufactures metal-faced plywood, which has a thin metal sheet bonded to a plywood core. Which standard covers this composite panel?
We produce polymethyl methacrylate (PMMA) or acrylic sheets for skylights and transparent cladding. Which BIS standard applies?
Our factory makes elastomer insulated cables for flexible and fixed wiring in buildings. Which Part of IS 9968 is applicable for low-voltage versions?
We produce fittings for rigid non-metallic (PVC) conduits such as bends, couplings, and junction boxes. Which BIS standard governs these fittings?
Our company manufactures high-density polyethylene films for use as vapour barriers and damp-proof membranes in building construction. Which BIS standard applies?
